h1: Scorpio May 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
energy_theme: Full Moon in your sign, then a partnership reset
affirmation: I bring depth into the light

at_a_glance.Energy Theme: A Full Moon in your sign, then your annual partnership new moon
at_a_glance.Key Dates: Full Moon May 3 (Scorpio, 1st house) / New Moon May 16 (Taurus, 7th house) / Blue Moon May 31 (Sagittarius, 2nd house)

at_a_glance.Career: Personal clarity first, then a contract or collaboration conversation

content:
This Month's Energy

Scorpio, May 2026 opens with a Full Moon in your own sign on May 3 — your personal clarity climax of the year, when something you have been carrying in the dark comes into the light. The Taurus New Moon on May 16 falls in your seventh house of partnership — your annual relationship reset, the mirror moment. The Blue Moon on May 31 lands in your second house of income and self-worth — a pricing, salary, or self-value decision reaches clarity as the month closes. Abundance and expansion is the theme, and for you that abundance comes only after the Full Moon in your sign pulls something true out into the open.

Key Dates for Scorpio in May 2026

| Date | Transit | Meaning for Scorpio | Do / Avoid | |------|---------|-------------------|------------| | May 3 | Full Moon in Scorpio (Flower Moon) | Personal clarity climax — Do: write what you now know about yourself / Avoid: holding it in the dark any longer | | May 9 | Venus square Pluto (your ruler) | Power in love or money — Do: name the dynamic / Avoid: weaponizing depth | | May 16 | New Moon in Taurus | Partnership and relationship reset — Do: set a 12-month intention for the kind of partnership you are calling in / Avoid: setting it based on who you used to be | | May 20 | Sun enters Gemini | Intimacy and shared-resources conversations — Do: revisit joint finances / Avoid: vague arrangements | | May 25 | Mars enters Virgo | Friendship and network energy — Do: reach out to allies / Avoid: isolating | | May 31 | Blue Moon in Sagittarius (Micro) | Income, self-worth, possessions — Do: make the pricing decision / Avoid: underpricing |

Career & Money

Scorpio, the May 3 Full Moon in your sign gives you a personal clarity that directly shapes your next year — what you actually want, what you are outgrowing, what hidden pattern has been quietly steering the ship. Write it down on May 3 or May 4; the writing becomes the strategic base for the next twelve months. The May 16 Taurus New Moon in your seventh house is your annual contract-and-collaboration reset — set the 12-month intention for the kind of partner, client, or co-creator you are calling in, then send the proposal in the week of May 18–25. The Blue Moon on May 31 in your second house brings a pricing, salary, or self-worth decision to clarity in the final hours of the month; quote the higher number, and do not undercut yourself to avoid conflict. When Mars enters your eleventh house on May 25 your network and audience expand; reach out to allies you have neglected and accept the invitations you have been deflecting. The Venus-Pluto square on May 9 (your modern ruler) can expose a money or power dynamic in a work partnership; the data is more valuable than the discomfort. Pair the self-worth focus with our crystals for wealth framework.

Love & Relationships

The Taurus New Moon on May 16 in your seventh house is the headline love moment of your year — your annual relationship reset. Single Scorpio may meet someone with real weight and depth, often through a professional setting or a transformational shared experience; partnered Scorpio will reach a clear choice about commitment, location, or future direction. The May 3 Full Moon in your sign says: get honest about who you are first; the partnership that matches that honesty will find you, and the partnership that does not match it is the one to release. The Venus-Pluto square on May 9 can expose a power undercurrent — money, attention, sex, control — that has been quietly shaping the relationship; naming it once is more powerful than weaponizing it for a year. The Blue Moon on May 31 brings a money-and-self-worth decision that will affect the next chapter of your love life; the person who respects your worth is the person to keep. For support in opening the heart after years of armor, see our crystals for love collection.

Health & Wellness

The May 3 Full Moon in your own sign makes early May a body-and-soul check-in — Scorpio often carries intensity in the reproductive and excretory systems; hydrate, eat clean, walk daily. Citrine is traditionally associated with sunlight, optimism, and steady will — often used as a mindfulness reminder when the inner weight gets heavy. With the Blue Moon on May 31 in your second house, the throat and neck may also ask for attention; warm drinks and gentle neck stretches help. The May 3 Full Moon in your own sign makes early May a body-and-soul check-in — Scorpio often carries intensity in the reproductive and excretory systems. Hydrate, eat clean, walk daily, and ease up on alcohol and caffeine in the week of the Full Moon. With the Blue Moon on May 31 in your second house, the throat and neck may also ask for attention; warm drinks and gentle neck stretches help more than another cold plunge.

Crystal of the Month: Citrine

Why this crystal fits Scorpio this month. Scorpio, your gift is depth; May asks for the sunlight that lets that depth be seen and shared. Citrine, traditionally associated with joy, confidence, and abundance, lines up directly with the Full Moon in your sign (you, in the light) and the Blue Moon in your income house (your worth, in the world). It is the stone that helps you bring the inside out — without losing the inside. How to use it during May. Hold Citrine on May 3 when you write what you now know about yourself. Carry it on May 16 when you set the partnership intention. Keep it in your wallet from May 25 onward, leading up to the May 31 income decision. Best date to use it. May 3, the Full Moon in your sign — with Citrine in hand, write the one-sentence answer to: What am I ready to bring out of the dark this year? Read more. Deep dive in our full Citrine meaning guide and explore the complete Scorpio crystals collection.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

Date: May 3, Full Moon in Scorpio (first house of self). 1. Cleanse your Citrine in morning sunlight for ten minutes. 2. Write the answer to one question: What is one truth about myself that I have been carrying in the dark? Write three sentences. 3. Because the Taurus New Moon two weeks later is about partnership, write a second line: The partnership that matches this truth-telling version of me is ___. 4. Place the Citrine on both lines overnight on your nightstand. Each morning for a week, hold the stone for two minutes and reread the first three sentences aloud.

Shop

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Scorpio crystal guide for stones traditionally connected with depth, transformation, and abundance — Citrine pairs beautifully with Malachite for a Scorpio depth-and-light kit.

FAQ

What should Scorpio avoid in May 2026? Avoid holding the May 3 Full Moon truth in the dark any longer — the personal clarity arrives to be written down and spoken, not stored. Also avoid weaponizing the Venus-Pluto power undercurrent on May 9; naming the dynamic once is more powerful than wielding it for the rest of the year. Is May 2026 a good month for Scorpio? Yes — it is one of your most important months of the year. The Full Moon in your sign on May 3 and the New Moon in your partnership house on May 16 are both standout days. What does the May 3 Scorpio Full Moon mean for me? It is your personal clarity climax of the year. Something you have been carrying in the dark comes into the light. Write it down. How will the May 16 Taurus New Moon affect Scorpio? It activates your seventh house of partnership. The 12-month intention you set this day shapes your entire year of relationship, contract, and collaboration. What is the best crystal for Scorpio in May 2026? Citrine. With a Full Moon in your sign and a Blue Moon in your income house, bringing depth into the light is the work — and Citrine is the traditional sun-and-worth ally. Scorpio-only question: Should I tell a long-held secret in May 2026? The Full Moon in your sign on May 3 is one of your strongest truth-telling windows of the year. Tell one person, in private, in the first week of May — then use the May 16 New Moon in your partnership house to widen the circle.
